creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Fri Feb 15 15:08:34 2013
New Revision: 312293
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312293

Log:
  - Update to 0.9.12
  
  PR:		ports/176161
  Submitted by:	William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/py-django-tastypie/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/py-django-tastypie/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-django-tastypie/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/py-django-tastypie/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-tastypie/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 14:55:50 2013	(r312292)
+++ head/www/py-django-tastypie/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 15:08:34 2013	(r312293)
@@ -1,13 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	django-tastypie
-# Date created:			May 8, 2012
-# Whom:				William Grzybowski
-#
+# Created by: William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	django-tastypie
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.11
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.12
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -18,10 +13,7 @@ COMMENT=	Create REST API for Django apps
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mimeparse>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-mimeparse \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=1.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil
 
-USE_PYTHON=	2.5+
+USE_PYTHON=	2.6+
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
-PYDISTUTILS_NOEGGINFO=	yes
-
-PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-django-tastypie/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-tastypie/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 14:55:50 2013	(r312292)
+++ head/www/py-django-tastypie/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 15:08:34 2013	(r312293)

+SHA256 (django-tastypie-0.9.12.tar.gz) = 5b9a8d2e1ec562b23f4c94cfe387262f4c573dfdf673af80f13b1d137dbf841f
+SIZE (django-tastypie-0.9.12.tar.gz) = 704067
